boj_rate_hike.mechanism: Yen carry unwind; US-Japan rate differential narrows

fed_rate_cut.mechanism: Lower real rates reduce dollar attractiveness; risk-on; duration rallies

fed_rate_hike.mechanism: Higher rates increase dollar attractiveness; discount rates pressure long-duration assets

us_cpi_beat.mechanism: Inflation persistence delays Fed cuts; rate expectations reprice higher

us_cpi_miss.mechanism: Disinflation supports rate-cut expectations; real yields fall

strong_nfp.mechanism: Labor strength reduces urgency for Fed easing

weak_nfp.mechanism: Labor weakness raises cut expectations but also growth concerns

risk_off.mechanism: Safe-haven flows; deleveraging of risk positions

oil_spike.mechanism: Oil-linked currencies and producers benefit; inflation passthrough pressures consumers

china_slowdown.mechanism: China is the marginal demand driver for industrial metals and commodity FX

china_stimulus.mechanism: Stimulus revives construction and manufacturing demand expectations

dollar_strength.mechanism: Dollar-denominated commodities become more expensive in local currencies; EM dollar debt burden rises

yield_curve_inversion.mechanism: Banks' net interest margins compress; growth expectations deteriorate

geopolitical_escalation_mideast.mechanism: Supply disruption risk premium in oil; safe-haven demand

ai_capex_acceleration.mechanism: Hyperscaler capital expenditure flows to chips, power, and data center construction
